steps.t: The shade of Isildur asked you to retrieve a weather-stained coffer from the encampment of Sharkey's Slough, south-west of Tol Send.
The shade of Isildur is waiting for you to bring the weather-stained coffer to Tol Send.
Elrond is on Tol Send, the Isle of the Flowers in the Gladden Fields. Elrond examines the weather-stained coffer with some interest.
The shade of Isildur is pleased that you found the weather-stained coffer and brought it to Tol Send, and now wishes to tell you the tale he promised.
The Memories of the Great Alliance will allow you to experience the Siege of Barad-dûr at the end of the Second Age, as relayed to you by the shade of…
Ontamo is in Díngarth, chief fortification of the Great Alliance in Mordor Besieged.
